arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network interface.

association.description: Information about the association of the network interface with an Elastic IP, if any.

attachment.description: Details about the attachment of the network interface to an instance.

availability_zone.description: The Availability Zone in which the network interface is located.

description.description: The description of the network interface.

id.description: The unique identifier for the network interface.

ipv6_addresses.description: The IPv6 addresses associated with the network interface.

mac_address.description: The MAC address of the network interface.

outpost_arn.description: The ARN of the Outpost the network interface is associated with, if applicable.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the network interface.

private_dns_name.description: The private DNS name assigned to the network interface.

private_ip.description: The primary private IPv4 address of the network interface.

private_ips.description: A list of all private IPv4 addresses assigned to the network interface.

requester_id.description: The ID of the entity that requested the network interface.

security_groups.description: The security groups associated with the network interface.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet to which the network interface is attached.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the network interface.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC in which the network interface resides.
